name: TARSAL TUNNEL SYNDROME
definition: entrapment / compression neuropathy (analogous to carpal tunnel syndrome) of
dominant_finding: fracture of sustentaculum tali / medial tubercle of posterior talar process
distribution: fracture of sustentaculum tali / medial tubercle of posterior talar process
discriminating_features: mass in tarsal tunnel (ganglion, neurilemmoma, lipoma, thickened flexor retinaculum, muscle)
muscle edema from denervation in abductor hallucis (supplied by medial plantar nerve) /
fracture of sustentaculum tali / medial tubercle of posterior talar process

general: mass in tarsal tunnel (ganglion, neurilemmoma, lipoma, thickened flexor retinaculum, muscle)
muscle edema from denervation in abductor hallucis (supplied by medial plantar nerve) /
fracture of sustentaculum tali / medial tubercle of posterior talar process
